subsequent_attempts.reason: The first parallelization commit connected scan_streaming_idm_stats_from_config but missed the direct train_streaming_idm stats call-site, so full training still entered the serial action-history stats path.

cancellation_reason: Action-history streaming stats ignored stats_num_workers and scanned the full 393GB train JSONL on rank0 while all 4 H200 GPUs were idle. The run was stopped before training and the reservation was cancelled to avoid sustained idle GPU time.
followup: Add action_history_parallel_by_path stats parallelization, recommit, then relaunch the exact-set history IDM run.
